author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Problem: CUDA graphs require fixed kernel launch parameters, but decode step has variable seq_len (grows by 1 each token). The bmm, softmax, and slice_read all change shape. Solution: pad to fixed max_positions for ALL operations, mask unused positions. This means: (1) always read full KV cache [B*H, max_pos, D_h] instead of [B*H, filled, D_h], (2) use max_pos for softmax/bmm dimensions, (3) mask future positions in the attention scores. The padding means some wasted compute but the graph replay eliminates 600x overhead.
